mapper.sql: id, recipient_member_id as recipientMemberId, type, reference_type as referenceType, reference_id as referenceId, payload, read_at as readAt, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications ( recipient_member_id, type, reference_type, reference_id, payload, read_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{recipientMemberId}, #{type}, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId}, #{payload}, #{readAt}, current_timestamp ) ON CONFLICT (recipient_member_id, type, reference_type, reference_id) DO UPDATE SET payload = excluded.payload, read_at = excluded.read_at, updated_at = current_timestamp

insert into notifications ( recipient_member_id, type, reference_type, reference_id, payload, read_at, created_at ) values ( #{recipientMemberId}, #{type}, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId}, #{payload}, #{readAt}, current_timestamp ) on conflict (recipient_member_id, type, reference_type, reference_id) do update set payload = excluded.payload, read_at = excluded.read_at, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.update: update notifications set read_at = #{readAt}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
